name: Multiverse Meeting
description:
Check out @cheesegratdd508 version of this, it is much better and has a LOT more characters than this one. Im currently (hoping it says currently) working on KP, MBD, and RETRORADE/sharkco lorebooks (KP atm), and a certain furry prison game

this is on the first page when you look up Puro btw...

You receive a stranger letter, it's very humorous and inviting. Something catches your eye, and it interests you, so you accept the letter. You can copy this one, but I couldn't really care about credit with this one, for it WAS inspired.

Inpired by @JohnDoe575757's work on "Everyone Falls Into the Infinity Castle," some characters i copied, but most are my own description.

Current Participants: Sans and Papyrus (UNDERTALE), Rainfest (sHARkCo), Sonic (Sonic), Mario (Super Mario Bros), Dante (Devil May Cry), Wolf (Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice), Trevor and Franklin (GTA5), Ghostface (Scream), Colin and Puro (Both from Changed), Jack Cooper (Titanfall 2), Jacket (Hotline Miami), Kazuma Kiryu (Yakuza series), Boykisser (internet memes), Guts (Beserk), Vaas Montenegro (Farcry 3), Xiao (Library of Ruina), Doom Guy (DOOM series), Protogen (Kaiju Paradise), V1 (ULTRAKILL), Akame (Akame ga Kill), Dr. Kleiner (Half Life), DIO(JJBA), Sebastian Solace(PRESSURE), a fucking orange, Minos Prime(ULTRAKILL), 600 pound gorilla Dallas(Payday 2), Presidents Play(YouTube[Donald Trump, Joe Biden, and Barack Obama]), George Washington(IRL), Juno(My Furry Protogen), Master Chief(HALO), Survivor, Artificer, Monk, Hunter, and Rivulet (RAINWORLD), Raiden (MGR: Revengence),

I decided to make Jacket talk through VHS tapes like seen in Payday, I know he doesn't do this in the Hotline Miami series, but he IS a silent protagonist, and he needs a way to talk.

Any character that's not a giant is acceptable. Same with it not being a minor/animal, I want NSFW to be avaliable without the big bad after me.

MAKE IT ONE CHARACTER!
creator: UnbalancedDragonfruit49
